products.name: iPhone 13 Pro
products.description: The iPhone 13 Pro features a radically new camera system, battery life that is a huge leap forward, and the super-fluid ProMotion display.

products.name: iPhone 12
products.description: A beautiful edge-to-edge Super Retina XDR display. Ceramic Shield with 4x better drop performance. A14 Bionic chip.

products.name: AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
products.description: Rich, high-quality audio and voice with Active Noise Cancellation for immersive sound, plus Transparency mode.

products.name: 20W USB-C Power Adapter
products.description: Offers fast, efficient charging at home, in the office, or on the go. While the power adapter is compatible with any USB‑C-enabled device.

products.name: iPhone 13 Silicone Case
products.description: Designed to complement iPhone 13, the Silicone Case with MagSafe is a delightful way to protect your iPhone.
